knockoutMilestone.description: Cumulative knockout bonus — each value is added when the team advances to that round (2 + 4 + 6 + 8 = 20 max).

rulesText.summary: Each lab member owns 3 teams. Points come from match results (3/1/0) plus cumulative knockout bonuses as teams advance.
rulesText.matchPoints: Win = 3 pts, Draw = 1 pt, Loss = 0 pts. Applies to all matches including knockouts.
rulesText.penalties: If a knockout match is decided on penalties, it counts as a draw (1 pt each) for match scoring. The team that advances receives the next knockout bonus tier.
rulesText.milestone: Knockout bonuses stack as a team advances: +2 for Round of 32, +4 for Round of 16, +6 for quarter-final, +8 for semi-final (20 total if they reach the last four). Bonuses use openfootball fixture data only — no computed group tables. A team earns each tier when they are slotted into that round or win through to the next.
rulesText.playerTotal: Your score is the sum of all points from your three teams.
